mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is declining, discount rates and recession odds fall together, lifting equity multiples and supporting positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day forward SPX returns are negative or below unconditional returns in more than 55% of FEDFUNDS-decline observations, or if rolling 2-year Rank IC stays below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in FEDFUNDS above 4.5% tightens financial conditions and raises the equity discount rate, so subsequent S&P 500 returns are negative over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 20-day returns in more than 55% of cases, or if the sign effect disappears after the first month of a tightening cycle.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE signals weakening household income and demand, which tends to reduce sales expectations and pressure S&P 500 returns lower over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if UNRATE-rise triggers are followed by positive 20-day returns more than 50% of the time, or if the average forward return is not below the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: When PAYEMS is rising while UNRATE is falling, labor income growth improves consumption and earnings expectations, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-up and UNRATE-down condition does not outperform either single-series effect, or if 20-day returns are not positive in at least 55% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in RSAFS implies stronger nominal consumer spending and revenue growth, which should lift S&P 500 returns over the next quarter as analysts revise earnings upward.
failure_condition: Reject if 60-day forward returns are not higher after positive RSAFS trends than after flat or negative trends, or if the rolling 3-year Rank IC falls below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: An increase in INDPRO together with a rise in HOUST signals a broad production upswing and demand for cyclicals, supporting positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if the combined INDPRO-HOUST signal does not beat each component alone, or if triggered periods do not show positive 20-day SPX returns more than 55% of the time.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL accelerates while FEDFUNDS is still below neutral, inflation pressure can raise real-rate uncertainty and compress equity multiples, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if inflation-acceleration triggers are followed by non-negative 5-day returns more than 60% of the time, or if the effect vanishes once FEDFUNDS exceeds 5%.

mechanism_narrative: A downturn in GDPC1 confirms weakening aggregate demand, and in a slowing economy the market should discount lower future earnings, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Reject if two-quarter GDP declines are not followed by below-baseline 60-day SPX returns, or if the signal remains negative in fewer than 50% of triggered episodes.
